prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of HD (Home Depot), the stock typically exhibits an annualized volatility of approximately 25-30%. For an 18-day forecast, this translates to a standard deviation of roughly 4-5% of the current price. The point estimate assumes modest upward momentum typical of large-cap retail stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed using normal distribution assumptions with increasing width for higher confidence levels, accounting for market uncertainty and potential volatility in the home improvement retail sector.
